name: Wanpy Cat Pouch - Chicken & Shrimp 85g
shortDescription: WANPY Cat Pouch Chicken & Shrimp 85g is a complete, preservative-free wet cat food made with real chicken and shrimp, suitable for kittens and adult cats.
description: WANPY Cat Pouch – Chicken & Shrimp 85g is a super-premium wet cat food formulated to provide complete and balanced nutrition for both kittens and adult cats. Made with real chicken and shrimp, this protein-rich recipe supports healthy muscle development, daily energy needs, and overall vitality. The soft, moist texture is highly digestible, allowing nutrients to be easily absorbed while being gentle on sensitive stomachs. With a high moisture content, WANPY Chicken & Shrimp helps promote hydration and supports urinary tract health especially beneficial for cats that drink less water. This recipe contains taurine, essential vitamins, and minerals to support heart health, vision, and immune function. Free from added preservatives, artificial colors, and flavors, it offers a clean and natural meal your cat will love. The convenient 85g single-serve pouch ensures freshness, easy portion control, and minimal waste. It can be served as a complete meal or used as a tasty topper over dry food to enhance appetite and flavor. Product Overview Brand: WANPY Product Type: Wet Cat Food / Pouch Flavor: Chicken & Shrimp Weight: 85g Suitable For: Kittens and adult cats Texture: Soft, moist, and easy to digest Formulation: Complete and balanced nutrition Ingredients Chicken Shrimp Water Natural thickener Taurine Added vitamins and minerals No added preservatives, artificial colors, or flavors. Nutritional Information (Approximate) Protein: Min. 9% Fat: Min. 2% Fiber: Max. 1% Moisture: Max. 85% Energy: Approx. 70–75 kcal per pouch Key Benefits Supports healthy muscle growth and daily energy Encourages hydration and urinary tract health Soft texture suitable for kittens, seniors, and sensitive mouths Enhances appetite in picky eaters Can be fed as a complete meal or as a dry food topper Feeding Guidelines Serve directly from the pouch or mix with dry cat food Adjust feeding amounts based on age, weight, and activity level Always provide fresh drinking water
